stories.title: Sinner dispatches Zverev, defends Wimbledon title
stories.summary: Top-ranked Jannik Sinner beat Alexander Zverev 6-7 (7), 7-6 (2), 6-3, 6-4 for his second consecutive Wimbledon title and fifth Grand Slam crown.

stories.title: McGregor's coach says right knee 'never an issue'
stories.summary: Conor McGregor's right knee was "never an issue" ahead of UFC 329, according to his longtime head coach John Kavanagh.

stories.title: Wheeler rejects ASG nod, 'disrespected' by snubs
stories.summary: Phillies ace Zack Wheeler said he declined an invitation to be added to the NL All-Star roster, adding that he felt "disrespected" by being snubbed multiple times.

stories.title: Free agent Diggs: No WR2 in NFL better than me
stories.summary: Free agent Stefon Diggs says he is better than any No. 2 wide receiver currently on an NFL roster.

stories.title: Pebley out as Sparks GM, assistants to share role
stories.summary: Raegan Pebley is out after two and a half years as the Sparks' general manager, the team announced Sunday.
